title: Regex compiled on every call in parse_mentions/parse_hashtags/autolink_bare_urls
description: In posting.rs, parse_mentions (line 402), parse_hashtags (line 425), and autolink_bare_urls (line 448) each call Regex::new() every invocation. These functions are called on every post creation and every content render. What goes wrong: Regex compilation is expensive (microseconds per call); under load this becomes measurable latency. The fix is trivial: wrap each in a LazyLock<Regex> static, matching the pattern already used for FEDI_POST_RE at line 381.
